title: lobularia canariensis
intro: Lobularia canariensis, also known as sweet allysum or sweet stock, is a flowering plant native to the Canary Islands. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antispasmodic properties. The plant's health benefits include reducing anxiety and stress, relieving digestive issues, and soothing respiratory problems. Lobularia canariensis can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, as well as being used in aromatherapy and topical applications.
